StaticProperties.text: UPGRADE THE CENTRAL AIR UNIT TO EXTEND EXTERNAL EXPEDITION WINDOWS.

$/1.Text: ADDS AN EXTRA FABRICATION BAY FOR TOOLING AND SUIT MAINTENANCE.
SHORTENS ORGANIC MATTER PROCESSING BUT INCREASES POWER DRAW.
INCREASES RECOVERY SPEED FOR EXHAUSTED ALTERS DURING STORM DAYS.
ENABLES LONG RANGE GATHERING RUNS DURING LOW RADIATION PERIODS.

StaticProperties.text: AN AVAILABLE TECHNICIAN WILL START THE NEW JOB AS SOON AS MATERIALS ARE READY.
THIS PROJECT PULLS INPUTS FROM BOTH MINING BAY A AND THE GREENHOUSE. EXPECT A SHORT DROP IN FOOD DURING THE BUILD WINDOW.
TOTAL EXPECTED OUTPUT THIS DAY: 2 FABRICATION JOBS, 1 RESEARCH STEP, 3 GATHERING RUNS.
PROVIDES FRESH FOOD AND A SMALL MORALE BONUS FOR THE WHOLE BASE.
